title: Heat check
subtitle: Six picks that hit different. Not a starter pack — these are what we actually run.

plugins.name: code-cleanup
plugins.why: Born from a real session — 25,000 lines removed, 4 bugs caught. 11 specialized agents scan for dead code, AI slop, weak types, N+1 queries, floating promises, security holes. LOW-risk dimensions auto-apply after build verification; HIGH-risk flags only — never touches your code without proof.

plugins.name: web-analytics
plugins.tagline: Push-based analytics team via self-hosted Umami + MCP
plugins.why: Replaces opening dashboards. 9 specialist agents fetch from self-hosted Umami via MCP (GA4 fallback for legacy), detect anomalies, analyze funnels, verify claims adversarially, deliver a narrative report. Three tiers: 30-second pulse, daily brief, or full cross-site deep-dive. Stop checking — get pushed.

plugins.name: kobiton-automate
plugins.tagline: Real mobile devices on demand — no emulators, no flaky CI
plugins.why: Direct access to Kobiton's real-device cloud via MCP. 12 tools across Devices / Sessions / Apps surfaces, plus 3 specialist agents for device picking, Appium capability reconciliation, session triage. iOS + Android hardware where the bugs actually live — not simulator drift.

plugins.name: excel-analyst-pro
plugins.why: Bridges Claude Code into the spreadsheets your finance team lives in. Models, projections, sensitivity analysis without the formula chase. Auto-invokes when xlsx files are in the conversation.

plugins.name: slack-channel
plugins.why: Chat with Claude from Slack DMs and channels, just like you'd chat in the terminal. Per-thread session isolation, hash-chained tamper-evident audit journal, policy-gated tools, five-layer prompt-injection defense. Socket Mode means no public URL needed — works behind firewalls. v0.9.1 Research Preview; requires Claude Code v2.1.80+.

plugins.name: gastown-viewer-intent
plugins.tagline: Mission Control dashboard for Gastown multi-agent workspaces
plugins.why: Real-time visibility into your agent swarms. Convoy dashboard (Done / Active / Blocked / Pending), D3 force-directed dependency graph across 14 Beads edge types, agent status with tmux integration, molecule progress tracker. Single binary (gvid) — go install or brew install, opens at localhost:7070.

meta.selection_criteria: Things you'll show someone over your shoulder. Not category-coverage — real stakes, real differentiation, real workflow change. Rotated when something hotter shows up.
meta.rotation_cadence: On vibes (and install velocity once Phase 5B telemetry lands).
